# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  - name: vmName
    type: string
    defaultValue: myVM
  - name: subnetName
    type: string
    defaultValue: mySubnet
  - name: nsgName
    type: string
    defaultValue: myNSG
  - name: location
    type: string
    defaultValue: eastus
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: '2019-11-01'
    name: "[parameters('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: allowRdpFromAnywhere
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefixes:
              - '0.0.0.0/0'
            destinationPortRange: 3389
            access: Allow
            priority: 100
        - name: allowSshFromAnywhere
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefixes:
              - '0.0.0.0/0'
            destinationPortRange: 22
            access: Allow
            priority: 99
        - name: allowHttpFromAnywhere
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefixes:
              - '0.0.0.0/0'
            destinationPortRange: 80
            access: Allow
            priority: 98
        - name: allowHttpsFromAnywhere
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefixes:
              - '0.0.0.0/0'
            destinationPortRange: 443
            access: Allow
            priority: 97
